included.name: Lawn Mowing
included.description: A clean, even cut for a healthy, great-looking lawn.

included.name: Weed Trimming
included.description: Neat trimming around fences, beds, and hard-to-reach areas.

included.name: Edging
included.description: Crisp, defined edges along walks, drives, and landscape beds.

included.name: Blowing
included.description: Walkways, driveways, and patios cleared for a finished look.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Cut
maintenance.description: For lawns kept at a manageable height with regular service — our most common visit.

firstCut.title: First Cut / Overgrown
firstCut.description: Tall, overgrown grass needs multiple passes and extra cleanup, so first cuts are quoted separately. Get on a regular schedule afterward to keep costs down.
